message:
feat(text-effects): implement border/outline effects (bd-882b)

Add OutlineStyle enum with Solid, Dashed, Double, and Gradient variants
for text stroke effects. OutlineConfig provides thickness (1-3),
color, and style configuration.

Implementation details:
- 8-neighbor (thickness=1), 16-neighbor (thickness=2), and 24-neighbor
  (thickness=3) offset patterns for outline rendering
- Outline renders after glow/shadow, before main text (correct z-order)
- Support for dashed outlines with configurable dash length
- Double outline style renders two concentric rings
- Animated gradient outline cycles colors over time
- Option to use text character or block character for outline

Includes 14 unit tests covering:
- Neighbor counts for each thickness level
- Solid continuous rendering
- Dashed alternation pattern
- Double ring detection
- Gradient animation
- Edge case handling
- Combined shadow/glow/outline effects

Also closes bd-3hsz (Shadow and Multi-Layer Rendering).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
